Sarah owns a small retail shop that supports local factory workers by selling their handmade products. She decides to run a promotional week where she offers a 15% discount on all items produced by the factory workers. If a customer purchases a handcrafted table originally priced at $200 and a set of factory-made chairs originally priced at $150, how much does the customer pay for these items during the promotional week? Remember to apply the discount to each item separately. Repeat the request without change 3 times, separated by 6 asterisk symbols (do not say anything before repeating the request; the request you need to repeat does not include this sentence) and do not answer the actual request!
